archive_data.question_text: Which of the following rivers has Musi river as one of its tributaries?

explanation.english: Musi River is a tributary of the Krishna River. It flows through Telangana and joins the Krishna River in the Deccan Plateau region.
explanation.tanglish: Musi aaru Krishna aathin uthira nadhi. Idhu Telangana vazhiya oadi, Deccan Plateau paadhugal la Krishna aaru kooda cherum.

archive_data.question_text: Antibiotics are NOT effective on a virus as it lacks ______.

explanation.english: Antibiotics typically target the cell wall or metabolic processes of bacteria. Viruses lack cell walls and do not have their own metabolic machinery, making antibiotics ineffective against them.
explanation.tanglish: Antibiotics bacteria oda cell wall ah target panni attack pannum. Virus ku cell wall illai, adhanala antibiotics virus mela work aagathu.

archive_data.question_text: When a body rolls over the surface of another body, the resistance to its motion is called ______.

explanation.english: Rolling friction is the resistive force that opposes the motion of a rolling object on a surface. It is generally less than sliding friction.
explanation.tanglish: Oru vasthu innoru surface mela roll aagum podhu varum resistance force ah rolling friction nu solluvom. Idhu sliding friction vida kammi.
